title: How Cursor builds agentic workflows across the SDLC
summary: Tido Carriero discusses how most companies plateau at 40% productivity gain with AI coding assistants and argues the real bottleneck is the broader SDLC, not code writing alone. Cursor has built agent systems for bug triage, security review, growth experiments, and product/engineering management, enabling teams to break past productivity plateaus through systematic automation of cross-functional workflows.
